---
title: "analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "out/",  
  fig.ext = "pdf",
  fig.height = 12,
  fig.width = 16,
  dpi = 300,                     # high resolution for non-vector formats
  echo = TRUE,                  
  warning = TRUE,               
  message = TRUE                
)
```

```{r source}
source("src/setup.R")
source("src/fns_associations.R")
source("src/fns_prevalences.R")

ds <- # dataset
  
  readRDS("data/who_hcw_survey_clean.rds")

cb <- # codebook

  read.csv("ext/data_mapping.csv", na.strings = "")

who_ipw_population <- # popuation data
  
  readRDS("ext/who_ipw_population.rds")

ipw_sample <- # sample data
  
  readRDS("ext/ipw_sample.rds")

# weights to DS

w <- 
  
  readRDS("ext/weights.rds")

# total denominator
who_n_loc <- 
  
  readRDS("ext/who_n_loc.rds")

gps_eu <- 
  
  readxl::read_xlsx("ext/GP-JQ-EURO_May2026.xlsx") |> 
  janitor::clean_names()

```

```{r weights}
ds <- left_join(ds, w, by = "user_id")
```

# N

Explore MeND

```{r}
ds |> 
  filter(work_2 == "Doctor") |> 
  group_by(specialty_cat, loc_2) |> 
  mutate(specialty_cat = if_else(specialty_cat == "Primary Care",
                                 "GP", "Other")) |> 
  count() |> 
  drop_na() |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = loc_2,
             y = n,
             fill = specialty_cat)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge")
```

Explore EU data

```{r}
gps_eu |> 
  filter(country %in% ds$loc_2) |> 
  group_by(country) |> 
  arrange(desc(years)) |> 
  print(n = 29)

gps_eu_clean <- 
  
  gps_eu |>
  mutate(country = if_else(country == "Czech Republic", "Czechia", country)) |> 
  filter(country %in% ds$loc_2) |> 
  rename(gp_n = general_practitioners,
         loc_2 = country) |>
  filter(!is.na(loc_2), !is.na(years), !is.na(gp_n)) |>
  mutate(
    year_gp = as.integer(years),
    gp_n  = as.numeric(gp_n)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(years), !is.na(gp_n)) |>
  group_by(loc_2) |>
  slice_max(years, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  select(loc_2, gp_n)
```

```{r}
ds |> 
  filter(specialty_cat == "Primary Care") |> 
  summarise(n = n(), .by = "loc_2") |> 
  left_join(gps_eu_clean, by = "loc_2") |> 
  mutate(coverage = n/gp_n*100) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = loc_2, y = coverage)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -0.5)
  
```
